=Rat Defence=

Nc6 is the key move to the Lisbon Gambit. White can greedily capture another pawn with '''[[/4. exd6/]]''', but must play accurately.
title: Chess Opening Theory/1. d4/1...d6/2. c4/2...e5/3. dxe5/3...Nc6
